items.title: Generators & Iterators
items.description: itertools tools are lazy iterators and compose naturally with your own generators.

items.title: Decorators
items.description: functools.lru_cache/cache and functools.wraps are decorators central to writing well-behaved wrappers.

items.title: Lambda & Higher-Order Functions
items.description: reduce and partial are higher-order tools often paired with lambdas and key functions.
